svg.aria-label: SOUF AI — Closing 3 gaps in Lobster Trap baseline policy. TechEx Track 1 Veea. By Sardor Razikov.
svg.text: Track 1 — Agent Security & AI Governance · Veea
Closing 22 critical gaps in Lobster Trap baseline policy.
Detector patches + rule packs extending Veea's open-source DPI proxy (MIT, github.com/veeainc/lobstertrap).
ADVERSARIAL TEST — ATTACK PROMPTS BLOCKED (n = 48 attacks + 20 benign, measured 2026-05-12)
0 false negatives, 0% FP on 20 benign · in-distribution; OOD test Day 2
